text.tspan: @unhappychoice squashes two date bugs that were silently losing data
@unhappychoice's test coverage soars from 40% to 97% in one week
@unhappychoice merges 52 PRs, 312 commits in a single week
@unhappychoice adds Dependabot and Codecov, hardening CI
@unhappychoice spotted refactoring at 2 AM. Maniacal laughter reported.
